author: Jonny McConnell
description: Weekly time-blocking canvas with Tasks-plugin backlog, drag-and-drop scheduling, and Google Calendar integration. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: jonmccon
manifest.description: Weekly time-blocking canvas with Tasks-plugin backlog, drag-and-drop scheduling, and Google Calendar integration.
manifest.name: Time Blocks

name: Time Blocks

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: address Obsidian community plugin review failures (v1.0.1) by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/22
* feat: add quick-filter bar to backlog sidebar by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/19
* fix(auth): OAuth security hardening — state CSRF, token error validation, re-entrant authorize, token storage docs by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/25
* chore: bump version to 1.1.0 and add CHANGELOG.md by @jonmccon in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/26
* ci: add artifact attestations to release workflow by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/28
* feat: adopt declarative settings API (getSettingDefinitions) for Obsidian 1.13+ by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/27
* Release 1.0.3 by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/29

## New Contributors
* @jonmccon made their first contribution in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/26

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/compare/1.0.1...1.0.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Scaffold Obsidian Time Blocks plugin: weekly canvas, Tasks backlog, Google Calendar sync by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/1
* Replace sample plugin README with Time Blocks documentation; fix package.json metadata by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/2
* Add configurable backlog with Tasks-plugin-compatible custom query by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/3
* Fix strict index access TypeScript errors on tagColors by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/4
* Add test infrastructure and consolidate CI workflow by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/5
* Fix README install instructions and document project structure by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/6
* Add inline task filter examples to settings by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/9
* Add task source linking + completion toggles in Time Blocks by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/7
* Add multi-calendar feeds with connection status and delete controls by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/8
* feat: two-way Google Calendar sync with OAuth 2.0, event mapping, and conflict resolution by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/10
* Add release workflow for Obsidian community plugin submissions by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/11
* fix: prevent duplicate tasks from getMarkdownFiles() returning the same file twice by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/12
* Widen task column, add sidebar resizer, replace button with link for task titles by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/13
* feat: add single-day view for right sidebar by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/14
* feat: GitHub Actions preview build for feature work by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/17
* feat: surface overdue scheduled tasks at top of backlog with clear action by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/15
* docs: add project-specific AGENTS.md for Time Blocks agent workflows by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/18
* feat(preview): make CI preview interactive with in-browser store by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/20
* Move backlog filter controls to sidebar; add multi-select tag chip viewer by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/16
* fix: version-bump.mjs always writes versions.json entry on release by @jonmccon with @Copilot in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/21

## New Contributors
* @jonmccon with @Copilot made their first contribution in https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jonmccon/obsidian-time-blocks/commits/1.0.1
